creator: LoN_Kamikaze@gmx.de
text:
The xrandr command outputs the following error message, when called without
parameters:

X Error of failed request:  BadRequest (invalid request code or no such operation)
  Major opcode of failed request:  154 (RANDR)
  Minor opcode of failed request:  6 ()
  Serial number of failed request:  9
  Current serial number in output stream:  9

I have two machines using the radeon driver. One Radeon 9200 SE with 128MB video
memory and a Radeon Mobility 7500 (M7) with 32MB video memory. The problem exists
on both machines.

How-To-Repeat: Just run
# xrandr
on a machine using the radeon driver.
